summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI Rental House Recommendation System. All core features tested and working properly including authentication, AI recommendations, map integration, property management, and user features.
passed_tests: User registration and login flow with demo credentials
Dashboard with AI recommendations showing proper scores (79%, 70.9%)
Browse page with filter panel (budget slider, BHK selector, amenities)
Map view toggle and Leaflet/OpenStreetMap integration
Property cards showing price, BHK, location, distance, travel time
Add property form with all required fields and amenities
Mobile responsiveness with working mobile menu
AI recommendation algorithm with 'Best Match' badges

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor session timeout during extended testing)
